component.name: DataPulse
component.summary: Per-app internet usage monitor and controller

description.p: DataPulse shows how much data each application on your system has downloaded and uploaded, filterable by time range from 5 minutes up to 30 days, with a tray icon showing a live combined total.

Beyond monitoring, DataPulse can block an individual app's network access, throttle its upload bandwidth, set a daily data cap that auto-blocks the app once reached, or run a kill-switch mode that blocks every app except an allow-listed set.
Renamed to DataPulse with a custom icon, added prerequisite checks, Rules overview, Kill Switch, CSV export, per-app usage charts, and desktop notifications for daily-cap auto-blocks.
